name: hyperinflation-monorepo
description: A modular world simulation with AI agents.

scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:ai
scripts.dev: start "PYTHON" cmd /k "npm run dev:ai" && start "NETTY" cmd /k "npm run dev:backend" && start "FLUTTER" cmd /k "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.clean: npm run clean:backend && npm run clean:frontend
